quick_skim.title: Comparative Study of Neural Surrogate Architectures for Autoregressive Prediction of Internal Battery States
quick_skim.abstract: The Doyle-Fuller-Newman (DFN) model resolves internal electrochemical states in lithium-ion batteries with high fidelity. However, the numerical solution of its governing equations is computationally prohibitive for real-time deployment, limiting scalability from individual cells to pack and fleet-scale applications. While machine learning surrogates can substantially reduce inference latency through GPU acceleration, most existing approaches learn solution approximations tied to specific operating conditions rather than learning generalizable state-evolution dynamics. This work presents a systematic comparison of four neural network architectures (MLP, ResNet, U-Net, FNO) formulated as autoregressive state-transition operators that predict full DFN internal states across a wide range of operating conditions. To ensure a controlled architectural comparison, all models are trained under a unified framework using multi-step unrolling and current-conditioning, isolating the impact of spatial inductive bias. Results demonstrate that the U-Net's multi-scale feature hierarchy achieves a mean final-step nRMSE of 3% averaged across all internal state variables after 300-step autoregressive rollouts, while providing a 5.38x speed-up over the numerical solver. These findings highlight spatial inductive bias as a critical determinant of surrogate performance, advancing the development of surrogates for internal state observability for next-generation battery management systems and digital twins.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Predicts internal battery states including SOC using neural surrogates for real-time lithium-ion battery applications
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用神经代理模型预测锂离子电池内部状态（包括SOC），适用于实时应用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用神经代理模型预测锂离子电池内部状态（包括SOC），适用于实时应用
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用神经代理模型预测锂离子电池内部状态（包括SOC），适用于实时应用
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper compares neural network architectures (MLP, ResNet, U-Net, FNO) as autoregressive surrogates for the Doyle-Fuller-Newman model to enable fast prediction of internal battery states like lithium concentration, potentially benefiting real-time SOC estimation in battery management systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文比较了多种神经网络架构（MLP、ResNet、U-Net、FNO）作为Doyle-Fuller-Newman模型的自回归代理，以实现锂离子电池内部状态（如锂浓度）的快速预测。该方法显著降低了计算成本，有望用于电池管理系统的实时SOC估计，为电池状态监测提供了高效工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文比较了多种神经网络架构（MLP、ResNet、U-Net、FNO）作为Doyle-Fuller-Newman模型的自回归代理，以实现锂离子电池内部状态（如锂浓度）的快速预测。该方法显著降低了计算成本，有望用于电池管理系统的实时SOC估计，为电池状态监测提供了高效工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: state of charge estimation for lithium ion batteries
